summary: 3D globe application with UTC offset selection, map settings, and time displays
architectural_notes: Map settings panel with time display
Local time display synchronized with UTC selection

existing_features.title: In the WebsiteLayoutPanel component, add a UTC info display under the 'Map Settings' section that shows the currently selected UTC offset in the same format as the local time display (e.g., 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45')

In the LocationMapExplorer page, add a local time display directly under the 'UTC Offset Selection' button that uses the same format as shown under Map Settings (showing UTC offset and time like 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45')

new_feature_requests.summary: Add UTC info under Map Settings in Website layout
Add local time display under UTC Offset Selection button with same format as Map Settings
